Compliance.description: PPRA registered, TPN for tenant screening/evictions, SSLR legal partner. Established 1964, no major 2025/2026 violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Low aggregate ratings: ComplaintsBoard 1.2/5 (35 reviews), HelloPeter ~2.6/5 branches. Frequent letting complaints but some positive Google for sales.

Product Value.description: Full letting/management services via 200+ offices. Good for hands-off but complaints on execution/value. Transparent market reports. Avg rent ~R9k Q1 2025.

Innovation.description: Website/virtual tours/PayProp payments/Google Workspace. No app/mobile portal. Early MLS adopter but limited new tech in 2025/6.

Customer Support.description: 200+ offices, phone/email/social. Reviews highlight poor letting support (delays/rudeness) despite network. TPN/SSLR aids evictions/legal. Mixed from reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website accessible; Google Workspace with enforced 2FA post-incidents. POPIA-compliant per privacy policy. Secure FICA handling, TPN integration. No recent breaches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Industry std: 8-12% monthly rent mgmt fee + 50-100% 1st month placement (+VAT); Seeff specifics not public

socialSentiment.summary: Negative on HelloPeter/complaints (deposits/maintenance); some positive Google. News neutral-positive market.
